use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and interfaces
Icon-only buttons for compact UI areas
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes with standard focus, hover, and disabled states. Uses Tailwind shadows for subtle depth and follows shadcn/ui design patterns for consistent integration.
